# neurovec { #neuroim.neurovec }

```python
neurovec(data, space=None, mask=None, label='')
```

Factory function to create appropriate NeuroVec type.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                   | Description                    | Default    |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------|------------|
| data   | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`) or [list](`list`)    | The image data                 | _required_ |
| space  | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`)         | 4D spatial metadata            | `None`     |
| mask   | [LogicalNeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.LogicalNeuroVol`) | Mask for sparse representation | `None`     |
| label  | [str](`str`)                                           | Vector label                   | `''`       |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                     | Description                     |
|--------|------------------------------------------|---------------------------------|
|        | [NeuroVec](`neuroim.neuro_vec.NeuroVec`) | DenseNeuroVec or SparseNeuroVec |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::NeuroVec
